prompt:
Fix CAO Web UI bugs per PRD at ~/cao-ui/CAO_BUGFIX_PRD.md

CRITICAL BUGS TO FIX:
1. Terminal Send command not working - input not reaching agent
2. Multiple agent spawns cause white screen crash
3. Beads CRUD not working (create/delete/assign)
4. No visual indicator when agent is working on a bead

TASKS:
1. Fix terminal send - debug api.sessions.input(), verify tmux send_keys
2. Create test client to verify all CRUD endpoints
3. Fix Beads CRUD - create, delete, assign, wip, close
4. Fix Sessions CRUD - spawn multiple agents without crash
5. Fix Agents CRUD - info modal, delete
6. Show agent-bead relationship in UI (both panels)
7. Run E2E test of full workflow

Bead model: 1 bead = 1 agent. Assigning sets wip+assignee. Orphaned = wip with no valid session.

Test everything end-to-end. All CRUD must work from UI.

Output <promise>CAO_BUGFIX</promise> when all bugs fixed and tested.

previousFeedback.qualitySummary: Core functionality verified working. Backend APIs all pass tests. Frontend fixes applied for spawn error handling and agent-bead relationship display.
improvements: Need to verify frontend changes work in browser
Should test multiple rapid spawns to confirm white screen fix
Close bead should clear assignee per PRD spec
nextSteps: Fix close bead to clear assignee field
Test frontend in browser for visual verification
Add more robust error handling in UI components
ideas: Add loading spinner during bead operations
Add toast notifications for success/error feedback
